title: Phase 140 — Safe Autopilot Recovery + Branch-Idempotent Intake v1
purpose: Move the next reliability step out of the polluted Phase 139 namespace and formalize recovery rules for duplicate generation, stale handoffs, branch re-use conflicts, and copy-vs-move routing confusion.
acceptanceCriteria: Phase 140 uses a new namespace and does not reuse the Phase 139 work branch.
The verifier confirms branch idempotency guidance exists: switch/reuse or unique branch, never fail solely because an old branch exists.
The verifier confirms stale handoff guidance exists: do not mark a new command complete from an unrelated previous CLOSED_CLEANLY handoff.
The verifier confirms duplicate generation becomes BLOCKED_WITH_EVIDENCE instead of silent pass/fail.
The verifier confirms routing semantics are documented: 13_chatgpt_downloads is source/capture and may retain a copy after routing to 01_apply_approved.
The verifier confirms saved ChatGPT target only and no random/new chat fallback.
